description: A wide landscape of a pine forest on sandy, hilly ground. Tall, slender pine trees with thick green canopies rise from dry sandy earth dotted with tree stumps, scrub, and small rocks. Dappled sunlight filters through the branches. The sky is partly visible through the trees at the left, showing blue patches with clouds. The overall palette is green, brown, and sandy gold.

_meta.title: On sandy soil. Mary-Howie on Finnish Railways
